query:
-- RRB Channels table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rrb_channels (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  genre VARCHAR(64),
  artwork VARCHAR(512),
  isActive INT DEFAULT 1,
  priority INT DEFAULT 100,
  listeners INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- RRB Stream Sources table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rrb_stream_sources (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  channelId INT NOT NULL,
  url VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  sourceType ENUM('soma', 'icecast', 'shoutcast', 'generic', 'custom') NOT NULL,
  priority INT DEFAULT 100,
  bitrate INT,
  format VARCHAR(32),
  isActive INT DEFAULT 1,
  lastHealthCheck TIMESTAMP,
  healthStatus ENUM('healthy', 'degraded', 'offline', 'unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  failureCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (channelId) REFERENCES rrb_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- RRB Frequencies table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rrb_frequencies (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  frequency INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  solfeggio VARCHAR(64),
  benefits TEXT,
  color VARCHAR(7),
  isDefault INT DEFAULT 0,
  isActive INT DEFAULT 1,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- RRB Listening History table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rrb_listening_history (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT,
  channelId INT NOT NULL,
  frequencyId INT,
  sessionStartTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  sessionEndTime TIMESTAMP,
  durationSeconds INT,
  deviceType VARCHAR(64),
  userAgent TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (channelId) REFERENCES rrb_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (frequencyId) REFERENCES rrb_frequencies(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

-- RRB Channel Stats table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rrb_channel_stats (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  channelId INT NOT NULL,
  date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  totalListeners INT DEFAULT 0,
  peakListeners INT DEFAULT 0,
  averageSessionDuration INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalStreamTime INT DEFAULT 0,
  uptime DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 100,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (channelId) REFERENCES rrb_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Insert default Solfeggio frequencies
INSERT INTO rrb_frequencies (frequency, name, solfeggio, benefits, color, isDefault, isActive) VALUES
(174, 'UT - Root Chakra', 'UT - 174 Hz', 'Grounding, pain relief, security', '#FF0000', 0, 1),
(285, 'RE - Sacral Chakra', 'RE - 285 Hz', 'Healing, energy restoration', '#FF7F00', 0, 1),
(369, 'MI - Solar Plexus', 'MI - 369 Hz', 'Transformation, emotional balance', '#FFFF00', 0, 1),
(432, 'FA - Heart Chakra', 'FA - 432 Hz', 'Healing, harmony, love', '#00FF00', 1, 1),
(528, 'SOL - Throat Chakra', 'SOL - 528 Hz', 'Miracle tone, DNA repair', '#0000FF', 0, 1),
(639, 'LA - Third Eye', 'LA - 639 Hz', 'Intuition, spiritual awareness', '#4B0082', 0, 1),
(741, 'TI - Crown Chakra', 'TI - 741 Hz', 'Awakening, enlightenment', '#9400D3', 0, 1),
(852, 'SI - Pure Consciousness', 'SI - 852 Hz', 'Spiritual connection', '#FF1493', 0, 1);
